title: AC Furnitures (Animal Crossing)
description: Add the Animal Crossing furniture to Minecraft
body:
AC Furnitures adds a wide variety of furniture inspired by the Animal Crossing universe into Minecraft. Whether you're decorating your dream house or simply want to add cozy vibes to your builds, this mod has everything you need!

✨ Features :
  🛋️ Chairs, benches, wardrobes, tables, and more decorative furniture
  🐾 Art style inspired by Animal Crossing
  🧱 Compatible with all vanilla Minecraft wood types
  🎮 Fully usable in both survival and creative mode
  🔧 How to use :

Place furniture like any block, rotate it to match your build, and create your own Animal Crossing-style world.

🌍 Languages :
 - English (en_us)
 - English (en_gb)
 - French (fr_fr)

🛠️ Planned Features :
 - Add all Carla Furnitures (Chest, Desk, Lamp, Low Table, Table, Wall Clock, Shelf, Wagon, Wardrobe)
 - Add all Gorgeous Series (Chest, Desk, Lamp, Low Table, Table, Wall Clock, Wardrobe, Seat, Sofa, Stool)
 - More content if the mod doesn’t flop 😉

📝 Feedback & Bug Reports :
   I’d love to hear your feedback!
   If you encounter any bugs or issues, please don’t hesitate to report them.
   Suggestions and ideas are also very welcome!
